characters.name: Characters
characters.description: The cast ofcharactersin the TV series includes but is not limited to:

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: AlexanderCharacter InformationBornCelestevilleGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationPrince of CelestevilleAlignmentGoodVoiceAmos Crawley(Seasons 1 - 2)Stuart Stone(Seasons 3 - 5)Alexanderis the youngest of the triplets andBabar&Celeste's youngest son. He is currently the Prince of Celesteville under Babar. Stuart Stone(Seasons 3 - 5) Alexander is the youngest of the triplets and the most troublesome. He often teases Flora and even likes to watch storms scare her, despite all this, he has her back. He often plays with his older brother, and usually drags his siblings into a little trouble like when he piloted an airplane and got into a hot air balloon without realizing a storm was coming. He was the first one of his siblings who tried to play with his newborn sisterIsabelle. In later episodes he has shown to not want to be around her, by the end of the episode, he warms up to her. He is also a thrill seeker, often wanting to do things that most children his age would not be able to or want to do, such as riding a Ferris wheel or riding in a balloon. InOh To Be An Adult, he is the first of the triplets to decide that he is old enough to make his own decisions. He is the most athletic of the triplets as he plays soccer, tennis, basketball and is a rower.  He likes goofing around and making others laugh, for his eleventh birthday he got a squirt gun.  He also enjoys reading comic books including the Scarlet Pachyderm, he even gets excited when Uncle Arthur dresses up as the Scarlet Pachyderm, even though it did scare his little sister.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: AlexanderCharacter InformationBornCelestevilleGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationPrince of CelestevilleAlignmentGoodVoiceAmos Crawley(Seasons 1 - 2)Stuart Stone(Seasons 3 - 5)Alexanderis the youngest of the triplets andBabar&Celeste's youngest son. characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationSailorExplorerAlignmentGoodVoicePaul Haddad (Adult)Stuart Stone (younger)ArthurisCeleste's younger brother, the brother-in-law ofBabar, the uncle of Babar's children and the the great-uncle of Badou. He wears a red sailor suit, and his alter ego was the, Scarlet Pachyderm which scared littleIsabelle, it seems he is the adventurist one in the family, as he likes boats and travels all the time. The kids thought that some pirates where after him, but in fact one of them just wanted his parrot to talk. While he can be on many accounts a bit careless, he does show his responsible side, such as when he and the triplets flew off into uncharted jungle, and he knew they had to get out. Explorer Stuart Stone (younger)

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationSailorExplorerAlignmentGoodVoicePaul Haddad (Adult)Stuart Stone (younger)ArthurisCeleste's younger brother, the brother-in-law ofBabar, the uncle of Babar's children and the the great-uncle of Badou. characters.name: Babar
characters.description: BabarCharacter InformationBirth NameBabarBornNew KingdomGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationKing of CelestevilleHeight6'0" (182 cm)Weight189 lbs (86 kg)AlignmentGoodVoiceGordon PinsentKristin Fairlie (Young Babar) Kristin Fairlie (Young Babar) Babaris the King ofCelestevilleand of Elephantland. He is married toCeleste, and has four children:Pom,Flora,Alexander, andIsabelle. He lives in an elaborate palace with his first initial carved in various locations, and also employsFour of his Stateship Servant Representatives:Pompadour, Little Dwarf Elephant: Troubadour, Eldest MemberCornelius, (Arthur;) Celeste's brother, and is Babar's brother-in-law andZephirthe monkey is one of his oldest friends.

characters.name: Babar's family
characters.description: IsabelleandAlexander. PomandFlora(and her doll). Babar's familyis quite large. He lives with his wife,Celeste. They have four children:

characters.name: Babar's mother
characters.description: Babar's MotherDeceasedCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantAlignmentGoodBabar's motheris an unnamed elephant that gives birth toBabar. After she is murdered by thehunterhe is adopted byMadame. She is Pom, Alexander, Flora and Isabelle's grandmother and Badou's great-grandmother. InBabar Returnsshe is mentioned by Cornelius telling Babar how she had suspected when she was alive and that she'd be proud of him. Just like in the book, she gives birth to Babar in the old kingdom.  In both the series, we don't know who her husband or Babar's Father is.  Also, in both the book and show Babar's mother is killed by the hunter and not long after she passed away, Babar was separated from the herd.

characters.name: Babar's mother
characters.description: Babar's MotherDeceasedCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantAlignmentGoodBabar's motheris an unnamed elephant that gives birth toBabar. characters.name: Badou
characters.description: BadouisBabar's grandson,PeriwinkleandPom's son. He is currently the Prince of Celesteville under Pom.

characters.name: Badou
characters.description: BadouisBabar's grandson,PeriwinkleandPom's son. He is currently the Prince of Celesteville under Pom.

characters.name: Basil
characters.description: "Your Rhiness!"-Basil oftens refers to Rataxes this way.BasilCharacter InformationBornRhinolandGenderMaleSpeciesRhinocerosOccupationAdvisor/ Secretary/ ministerAlignmentNeutralVoiceJohn StockerBasilisRataxes' personal valet and assistant. He is very short compared to most others, but is packed in a punch. He served as Rataxes' travel agent as well as his spy on seldom occasions. More often than not, Basil is shown to be more intelligent than his master, even when it involves him poking fun at him from time to time in an extremely subtle manner. He seems to likeBabarand gets along with him just fine. He is shown to be a wussy when Rataxes gets angry at him, but manages to keep his calm in the end. He is also obliged to take care ofVictor, Rataxes' son, should anything happen to him. As far back as the old kingdom, Basil was Rataxes' right hand man and was often asked to look into matters in Celesteville and give advice to Rataxes.  Just likePompadour, he knows all the laws of the land.

characters.name: Candy
characters.description: Candyis a little baby elephant that gets lost from her parents and is practically adopted byLady RataxesandLord Rataxes. Candy ends up on Lady Rataxes and Lord Rataxes doorsteps outside and thinks she's an orphan where it's their responsibility to adopt her in the meantime until her parents find her. Candy is actually Lord Rataxes' responsibility since Lady Rataxes wants him to look after her while she does everything else, but she goes missing all around the palace where Lord Rataxes will think Lady Rataxes will blame him for his mistake as to whether or not it's his fault.

characters.name: Candy
characters.description: Candyis a little baby elephant that gets lost from her parents and is practically adopted byLady RataxesandLord Rataxes. Candy ends up on Lady Rataxes and Lord Rataxes doorsteps outside and thinks she's an orphan where it's their responsibility to adopt her in the meantime until her parents find her. Candy is actually Lord Rataxes' responsibility since Lady Rataxes wants him to look after her while she does everything else, but she goes missing all around the palace where Lord Rataxes will think Lady Rataxes will blame him for his mistake as to whether or not it's his fault.

characters.name: Celeste
characters.description: CelesteCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantOccupationQueen of CelestevilleAlignmentGoodVoiceDawn GreenhalghTara Charendoff (Young Celeste)Elizabeth HannaBabar: The MovieSarah Polley (Young Celeste)Babar: The MovieQueen CelesteisBabar's lovely wife andArthur's elder sister. She is the matriarchal monarch queen ofCelesteville, the capital of Babar's elephant kingdom. They have 4 children together. She wears a crown just like Babar and is usually seen wearing a pink long-sleeved floor-length gown with frilly white cuffs and collar as well as a blue gem. Celeste's age is never directly stated but is shown to be 9-10 years old. She wears a pink dress and white shoes from the big store.  In the flashback episodes, She was very mature for her age as she was capable of taking charge of the lake cleanup and knew if the crash between her and Zephir was a case to be taken to court.  Even as an adult Celeste still maintained a strong mind and kind heart.  While not taking complete charge like her husband Celeste helps out in different parts of the kingdom, and cares very deeply for her family and children. When they were children she and Babar would play together in the jungle, when Babar got separated from the herd, she and her brother Arthur went to look for him.  She enjoyed her time in the city, especially the beauty store.  After a day in the city, she told him that they had to return home to help the herd. When they returned to the jungle, Celeste was willing to help Babar get rid of the hunter, or help in any way. While they were always good friends, Celeste and Babar started to have a boyfriend and girlfriend relationship inDouble the Guards.

characters.description: CelesteCharacter InformationBornOld KingdomGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantOccupationQueen of CelestevilleAlignmentGoodVoiceDawn GreenhalghTara Charendoff (Young Celeste)Elizabeth HannaBabar: The MovieSarah Polley (Young Celeste)Babar: The MovieQueen CelesteisBabar's lovely wife andArthur's elder sister. characters.name: Chiku
characters.description: Chikuis a monkey and isZephir's tomboyishdaughter and a good friend toBadou.

characters.name: Chiku
characters.description: Chikuis a monkey and isZephir's tomboyishdaughter and a good friend toBadou.

characters.name: Cornelius
characters.description: CorneliusCharacter InformationBirth NameCorneliusBornOld KingdomGenderMaleSpeciesElephantOccupationPrime Minister, Advisor, ServantHeight6'4" (193 cm)Weight197 lbs (89 kg)AlignmentGoodVoiceChris WigginsCorneliusisBabar's royal advisor, as well as his most trusted and loyal servant. He is kept throughout the series as one of Babar's closest friends, despite working for him domestically.  When Babar was a boy, Cornelius got along with Babar's mother and was very much a father figure to Babar.  He also takes the role as a surrogate grandfather towards Pom, Flora, Alexander and Isabelle. As well as a surrogate great grandfather towards Badou. He has a close bond with Pompadour, and frequently works alongside him while assisting Babar in his kingly duties. He is elderly, but is quite spry and possesses a great deal of wisdom. He is a bachelor and has no family that we know of1.  He has great connections with other animals and views all the elephants as family. He wears a military jacket with yellow lining and a yellow star with a belt.  He wears red pants with yellow stripes and black shoes.  He also has a sailor hat which matches his jacket, he does not wear it as often as the earlier episodes. He was an advisor of the Old King in the Old Kingdom and had a very good relationship with Babar's mother.  When Babar was born, some of his ideas for a name included "Horacio" and "Archimedes". We can see by this that he is very fond of ancient civilizations and their cultures. On several occasions, Cornelius has shown that he can be a powerful character, examples including but not limited to episodes likeThe CoinandThe Old Lady Vanishes. His personality changed into a form of intimidation, and he commands a large amount of respect in these episodes. He has saved Celesteville from terror a number of times, sometimes from natural causes and rarely even from Rataxes himself. Cornelius has also showed his ability to move the plot line of an episode along. InA Child in the Snow, his knowledge of the Great White Mammoth introduced the true reason of the journey into the mountains. InConga the Terriblehis refusal to admit to his old age being the reason for the shipwreck, he goes out to seek Conga himself in order to restrain the group. And inA Pair of Queenshe develops a quick and effective strategy to catch 'Queen' Christina before she arrives to the airport in order for Flora to apologize and make things better.

characters.name: Cristina Finlick
characters.description: Character InformationBirth NameCristina FinlickGenderFemaleSpeciesHippoOccupationPrincess,Victor's wife (The Adventures of Badou),Rhudi's mother (The Adventures of Badou) Cristina Finlick-RataxesisFlora's pen pal and friend, wife ofVictor Rataxes, & mother ofRhudi Christian Rataxes Finlick.  She is also a princess like Flora but at first says that she is a Queen. Christina was first introduced inA Pair of Queenswhere we find out from Flora that they had been writing to each other for a long time and she was going to be visiting that same day, but up until then they had never met in person.  Flora gives Christina a tour of the palace all while trying to avoid the watchful eyes of Cornelius.  She is very excited to see many of the exaggerated items and places Flora mentioned in her letters.  While she does enjoy herself she starts to feel guilty that she didn't tell Flora the truth, that she is not the Queen but the Princess of Finlick.  After she leaves, Cornelius sees her throw her royal sash into the nearby Garbage Can.  Flora meets her at the bus stop, and apologizes to her and she does the same for Flora.  She spends the weekend in Celesteville to get to know Flora better and even Pom and Alexander.

characters.name: Cristina Finlick
characters.description: Character InformationBirth NameCristina FinlickGenderFemaleSpeciesHippoOccupationPrincess,Victor's wife (The Adventures of Badou),Rhudi's mother (The Adventures of Badou) Cristina Finlick-RataxesisFlora's pen pal and friend, wife ofVictor Rataxes, & mother ofRhudi Christian Rataxes Finlick. characters.name: Elephant
characters.description: a boss of all animals  he got friends as lion monkey crocodile hippo and human

characters.name: Flora
characters.description: FloraCharacter InformationBornCelestevilleGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantOccupationPrincess of CelestevillePiano playerNewspaper PhotographerAlignmentGoodVoiceLisa Yamanaka(Seasons 1 - 2)Lea-Helen Weir(Seasons 3 - 5)Marsha Moreau(Babar: The Movie)Florais the second of the triplets,Babar&Celeste's oldest daughter;Pom,AlexanderandIsabelle's sister.  She is the Crown Princess of Celesteville. Piano playerNewspaper Photographer She is the middle child of the triplets, like all little girls she loves her dolls, skipping rope, and playing hopscotch. She is a bit of tomboy as she likes to play baseball as well.  While she does get teased by her brothers, usuallyAlexander, she loves them very much and often plays with them. Just like her father, she plays tennis, the piano, and has an interest in photography as shown inThe Celesteville Enquirer. She also takes ballet just like her mother did.  Another sport Flora does is rowing, especially when Pom, Alexander, and Victor were training for the rowing competition she was practicing on her own and was a real pro.  Aside from her brothers, Flora loves to play withIsabelle, just like sisters do.  When Isabelle first came home, she wanted to take care of her new sister, but got in trouble for waking her, just like her brothers.  She soon believes that her parents only care about baby Isabelle, as their parents spend all their time with her.  Unfortunately Flora's jealousy gets the better of her and she sends the diapers her parents ordered away.  Later on she tries to play the piano but Babar tells her to be quiet.  When she asks instead to read her a story he tells her no and she furiously bangs the piano waking up Isabelle again.  When Celeste asks where are the diapers they ordered Flora tells them what she did.  This shocks her parents, Celeste has to call them back while Babar goes to check on Isabelle but not before telling Flora he will talk to her later.  Flora becomes heartbroken and sad so she packs up her things and runs away, or rather hides in the attic to make her parents feel sorry.  When her brothers find her,Pomtells her that hiding in the attic just to get away from the baby is going too far and how much they all miss her, even her parents.  When her parents have a talk with her, Babar is surprised to learn that she was living in the attic and asks why she was there and not in her old room.  Flora angrily states that Isabelle moved into her old room and she was given a new room, which she didn't like because it wasn't next to her parents.  Her parents assure her that they still love her very much, they also tell her Isabelle also reminds them of her and that it won't be long until Isabelle will need her big sister for support and love.

characters.description: There is afoxor some kind of canine character in the show.

characters.name: Fox

characters.name: Hal and Mal
characters.description: Hal and Mal are two hippos that appear only in the episodeFriendly Agreementfirst they work as painters who enter the palace to paint but in the end it turns out that they are actually firefighters on the part ofTruffleswho wanted a new stove because the previous one burned a lot and between the two they say the phrase "That's right!".

characters.name: Happy Harry
characters.description: Happy Harry is a manager, sponsor and producer of the Celesteville radio stations for children's audience, he has black hair on his head, he is wearing a pink sweater with a white apron, blue pants and black shoes. He made his appearance in the episodeRadio Riotchose toZephiras the owner of his radio station in his ice cream parlor so that the children listen to his advice live and others contact him by phone to solve their problems, but whenVictor Rataxeshe told toZephiron the phone about the problem he has with his dadLord Rataxes, the children started a strike that caused a lot of problems and the adults did too but it all ended thanks toVictor Rataxeswho gave his speech to make everyone think, later Happy Harry decided to cancel the radio station ofZephirbecause he has six children who also went on strike.

characters.name: Hippopotamus
characters.description: There were hippos in the series that made their appearances in some episodes. These hippos are:

characters.name: Hunter
characters.description: Babarrams the hunter in revenge. Thehunteris the moustached human who shotBabar's motherin the series premiere. He serves as the main antagonist of the first batch of episodes, and minor posthumous antagonist in the later episodes. His voice actor is unknown. Between episodes 1 to 5, the hunter leads a group of other hunters to kill Babar and his friends. During these times, he never speaks. It wasn't until Babar's Triumph when he spoke, when he and his fellow poachers arrive at Rataxes' home, he shouts out "After them!" And when his camp was burned down by Babar and his friends, forcing the other hunters to flee. Angered, the hunter finally speaks as his henchmen leave in fear, "No! Come back!" But the other hunters didn't listen. It was then the hunter yelled out, "You can't run! I won't run!  I'LL DESTROY THEM A-A-ALL!!!!!!!!!" As he screams, he is engulfed and killed by the fire.

It wasn't until Babar's Triumph when he spoke, when he and his fellow poachers arrive at Rataxes' home, he shouts out "After them!" And when his camp was burned down by Babar and his friends, forcing the other hunters to flee. Angered, the hunter finally speaks as his henchmen leave in fear, "No! Come back!" But the other hunters didn't listen. It was then the hunter yelled out, "You can't run! I won't run!  I'LL DESTROY THEM A-A-ALL!!!!!!!!!" As he screams, he is engulfed and killed by the fire.

characters.name: Isabelle
characters.description: IsabelleCharacter InformationBornCelestevilleGenderFemaleSpeciesElephantOccupationPrincess of CelestevilleAlignmentGoodVoiceLisa YamanakaJulie LemieuxIsabelleisBabar&Celeste's adorable and beautiful youngest child. She is currently the Princess ofCelestevilleunder Babar. As the youngest child, she is the most playful and the sweetest of the children.  When we first see her she is around 2 or 3 years old, later on she gets bigger and is currently 4 or 5 years old.  In the first two seasons, she wore a white dress with red lines like in the stories, from season three onwards, she wears a blue dress and white shoes. In the episodeSpecial Delivery, we get to see that when Isabelle first arrived home, the triplets all wanted to play with her, but instead they got in trouble for waking her or disturbing her. The Triplets became hurt and jealous when Babar and Celeste were paying more attention to her, because she was still a baby and needed the attention. Eventually the three want nothing to do with her, Pom and Alexander decided to get rid of her (or sell her), and Flora tries to run away thinking her parents only love Isabelle. When Flora is found, her parents assure her that they still love her and her brothers and how much Baby Isabelle reminds them of Flora. Eventually the brothers warm up to her, especially when Babar reads them a story as he promised he would.

characters.name: Jake
characters.description: Jakeis a cute Jackal and one ofBadou's closest friends. He is the ward ofCornelius. Jake is softly-spoken and friendly, and often accompanies Badou and his friends on adventures. As a dog, he has a keen sense of smell and can use his nose to sniff out truffles. Jake is softly-spoken and friendly, and often accompanies Badou and his friends on adventures. As a dog, he has a keen sense of smell and can use his nose to sniff out truffles.

characters.name: Julian
characters.description: Julianis a young minor elephant boy character from the present scenes of "The Show Must Go On." In the episode, Julian is in a Rapunzel play directed byFlora. Julian does not enjoy the name Rapunzel because he has trouble saying it right, so he, being difficult, wants her to change the name to Jane. She expects him to be reasonable, but he says that either the name goes, or he goes. This situation remindsBabarof when he had to deal with another difficult dancer,Mademoiselle Soretoza.

characters.name: King Tuttle
characters.description: King Tuttle is a tortoise who appears inBabar's TriumphandKing Tuttle's Vote.

characters.name: King Tuttle
characters.description: King Tuttle is a tortoise who appears inBabar's TriumphandKing Tuttle's Vote.

characters.name: Lady Rataxes
characters.description: Lady RataxesCharacter InformationBirth NameLouise "Lady" RataxesBornRhinolandGenderFemaleSpeciesRhinocerosOccupationQueen of RhinolandVoiceCorrine KosloLady RataxesisLord Rataxes' very pretty wife and queen of Rhinoland. Unlike her husband, Lady Rataxes is kind hearted and patient with Babar and his family. While she can be demanding and very tough on her husband, her heart is in the right place. She and Rataxes have been married as far back as the Old Kingdom before the city of Rhinoland was built. She has a pet warthog named Reggie whom she does adore and cried when he was lost.  When she found out that Babar had kept him safe, she thanked him by lifting the Pomegranate blockade and made Rataxes promise never to do that to Celesteville ever again.  Whenever Lady Rataxes is sad, her husband does everything he can to make her happy again. She is very cultured and loves to visit the theatre, in the episodeThe Show Must Go On, we find out she loves Ballet and is the biggest fan ofMademoiselle Soretoza. According to the episode,My Dinner with Rataxes, she and Celeste have learned to get along, unlike Babar and Rataxes.  She does become upset when they aren't invited to the Celesteville Masquerade Ball, she would break items to get rid of her sadness, her husband set up a road block and taxed everyone who came by, however when they find out they were invited after all, she apologizes right away.  Just like Babar and Celeste, Lady Rataxes loves her sonVictor, when her son was on a camping trip, she took comfort in taking care of a baby elephant who was found outside of their palace.

characters.name: Lulu
characters.description: LuluisBabarandCeleste's lovely granddaughter andBadou's cousin.  She is currently the Princess of Celesteville.

characters.name: Madame
characters.description: MadameCharacter InformationBirth NameUnknownSpeciesHumanVoiceElizabeth Hanna Madame(akaThe Old Lady, her real name is not mentioned) is the human woman who adopted and raisedBabarafter his mother was killed by the hunter. She let him live inside her home before his coronation to king. Then he later built a home for her inCelestevilleof Elephant City. Madame has an old and dear friend whom was featured playing an organ inThe Phantom.

characters.name: Madame
characters.description: MadameCharacter InformationBirth NameUnknownSpeciesHumanVoiceElizabeth Hanna Madame(akaThe Old Lady, her real name is not mentioned) is the human woman who adopted and raisedBabarafter his mother was killed by the hunter. characters.name: Mademoiselle Soretoza
characters.description: Madamoiselle SoretozaCharacter InformationBirth NameMadamoiselle Rose Anastasia SoretozaGenderFemaleSpeciesOstrichOccupationBallet DancerHeight6.3AlignmentGood/BadVoiceElizabeth HannaMademoiselle Rosa Anastasia Soretozais arguably the antagonist of the episode "The Show Must Go On." She is an ostrich and a ballerina, and the star dancer.  She is considered by almost everyone as being the greatest dancer in the world. As the greatest ballerina ever, she is admired and known by many.  She was asked by Babar as a young king to perform with their ballet company, and while it took some persuading, she graciously agreed to come.  Like many great stars, she adores her fans and enjoys being showered with compliments, especially those who come to a usually closed rehearsal.  Despite her "politeness," she is not a very nice lady (which Babar and the others learn the hard way), as she gripes hard over anything that is not to her liking, be it an uncomfortable bed, overly rich food, or especially anything that goes wrong during rehearsal.  While the Celesteville ballet company is excited to be working with her, they all change their minds after she shows her true manners.  She is amateur-intolerant, as one mistake or inconvenience, no matter how little it is, and she screams and discourages the person who did it to the point where he or she quits on her ("Either he/she goes, or I go!") and buries her aching head inside a sandbox in her dressing room. In fact, her attitude discourages the original director just because his vision of the ballet doesn't match hers. She then choosesBabarto direct instead, but says she decides what he does. She has her make up person do makeup, but bashes her for not anticipating her sneeze "like a professional." She thanks Babar for her leaving. Much later, Soretoza makes an exception of her usual closed-rehearsal rule when Lord and Lady Rataxes attend the rehearsal just because they're patrons of the arts. When Babar tries to protest, as it is a closed rehearsal, she threatens that she has a headache coming on. As rehearsal is beginning, she screams over the spotlight on her being blue. Babar suggests having the light operator change the light, but she demands to change the operator himself, so he quits by dimming the lights gradually, much to Celeste's dismay.

characters.name: Periwinkle
characters.description: PeriwinkleisPom's long time childhood elephant girlfriend/wife &Badou's mother. She is currently the Crown Princess of Celesteville with Pom. Coming soon...
